title: lithocarpus ternaticupulus var. shinsuiensis
intro: Lithocarpus ternaticupulus var. shinsuiensis is a rare and endemic species of evergreen tree, belonging to the beech family, native to Taiwan. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and exhibit antioxidant activities. Its health benefits include potential applications in treating various conditions, such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its possible anti-cancer and antibacterial properties. Traditional herbal preparations involve using the plant's leaves, bark, or roots to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are then used to treat various ailments.
